_metadata.purpose: Lighthouse-CI config for Phase 2/3 CF Pages preview budgets (INF-08).
_metadata.owner: ssg-migration branch; do NOT merge into main — legacy .lighthouserc.json owns the main branch gate (D-32).

decisions.D-27: Budgets: LCP <= 2500 ms, total-byte-weight <= 512000 bytes per archive page.
decisions.D-28: SOFT fail (warn-only) for Phase 2 + Phase 3. Phase 4 close flips to error-level once PERF-01 (GEIPAN inline-JSON refactor) lands.
decisions.D-32: Coexists with legacy .lighthouserc.json on main; sibling config — never modify the legacy file.

_metadata.preview_url_substitution: Plan 02-08's CI workflow does `sed s|__PREVIEW_URL__|<cf-pages-preview>|g .lighthouserc.cf.json > /tmp/lhci.json` before invoking `pnpm exec lhci autorun --config=/tmp/lhci.json`. LHCI does not natively interpolate env vars in JSON config; sed-rewrite is simpler than dynamic JSON generation.
_metadata.phase4_close_toggle: To flip soft -> hard, change both assertion levels below from "warn" to "error". Single edit; no other config change required.
